title: Firework 3D
description: This texture updates the old Minecraft firework, making it 3D
body:
![interface](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c7d551db824e82e13d964faf581df90e058f390.png)

Firework 3D is a Minecraft texture pack that transforms the appearance of fireworks by introducing a new 3D model. This texture pack replaces the traditional 2D fireworks with more realistic and visually appealing 3D models, enhancing the overall experience of fireworks displays in the game.

Firework 3D is a unique texture pack designed to elevate your Minecraft experience by replacing the standard 2D fireworks with stunning 3D models. With this texture pack, each firework now has a more dynamic and realistic appearance, making your in-game celebrations and displays more immersive and visually captivating.

Features:
- Completely new 3D models for all fireworks
- Enhanced visual effects for a more realistic display
- Compatible with other texture packs and mods

Whether you're celebrating a special event or just enjoying the beauty of a fireworks show, Firework 3D will add an extra layer of excitement and realism to your Minecraft world. Download now and experience the magic of 3D fireworks!
